provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall broad young reptilian alien with grey-green overlapping scales, a wide flat angular snout with an underbite showing lower teeth, heavy brow ridges shading amber slit-pupil eyes, a small bony crest ridge on the skull, barrel-chested with a natural forward lean even while young, thick tail held neutral, wearing a basic cured dark hide chest wrap and leather leg bindings around powerful digitigrade legs, bare clawed feet on the ground, no house markings, a practice staff in one hand, the leather shows cheap construction

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
